uplink.description: Real-Time frame: 600 ppm CO2, 22.0 C, 45.0 %RH, all iZiAiR indices Excellent (CO2 source), comfort Good
uplink._note: expected derived from upstream TTN decoder (Carbon 0x7 Real-Time 0x2 frame); iZiAiR global/source/sub-indices/comfort -> iaq* camelCase extras

uplink.description: Real-Time frame: 660 ppm CO2, 22.4 C (0.2-step rounding), 45.5 %RH, mixed iZiAiR indices
uplink._note: expected derived from upstream TTN decoder; temperature 0.2*112 rounded to 0.1; 'Erreur' is upstream's verbatim label

uplink.description: Real-Time frame: 1500 ppm CO2, 30.0 C, 65.0 %RH, global Bad / source CO, sub-indices unmapped (suppressed), comfort error
uplink._note: expected derived from upstream TTN decoder; iaqCo2/iaqDryness/iaqMould/iaqDustMites codes are unmapped (upstream returns empty string) so they are suppressed

uplink.description: Wrong product nibble (0x8, not Carbon's 0x7) returns an error
uplink._note: expected derived from upstream TTN decoder; the shared upstream decoder produces an empty payload for any product != 0x7, so the non-Carbon product nibble is rejected here

uplink.description: Carbon Keep-Alive message (type 0xA) is not a Real-Time data frame and returns an error
uplink._note: expected derived from upstream TTN decoder; upstream decodes this only as Type_of_message Keep_Alive with no measurement, so this codec (Real-Time only) rejects it
